mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower equity discount rates, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or forward 20-day returns show no statistical significance (p>0.05) during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals labor market deterioration, triggering recession risk premiums that suppress S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive in >55% of triggered instances or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE stays below 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and builder confidence, driving corporate revenue expectations and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >60% of occurrences or the interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 0.5% month-over-month during high inflation periods confirms capacity utilization meets demand, preventing supply bottlenecks and supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are negative in >50% of triggered cases or the mechanism fails when CPIAUCSL exceeds 5.0% regardless of INDPRO growth.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index readings above 3.5% year-over-year force central bank tightening expectations, widening equity risk premiums and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are positive in >65% of triggered instances or the signal shows zero predictive accuracy when CPIAUCSL is between 3.0% and 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly payroll employment growth above 150,000 persons expands aggregate income and corporate profit margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 2-year windows or forward 60-day returns turn negative when PAYEMS growth exceeds 250,000 due to wage inflation fears.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where retail sales growth outpaces quarterly GDP growth by more than 1.5 percentage points signals unsustainable consumption leverage, triggering mean reversion and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in >55% of triggered instances or the divergence metric shows no correlation with equity drawdowns in backtesting.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production declines during a monetary tightening cycle indicate demand destruction rather than cyclical adjustment, accelerating earnings downgrades and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are positive in >60% of triggered cases or the signal loses predictive power when FEDFUNDS remains flat despite INDPRO declines.
